name: summarize-files
description: Scan a directory, then summarize each file in parallel and produce a combined report.

phases.task: List the source files directly under {args.dir} (non-recursive). Output ONLY a JSON array of objects like [{"file": "path"}]. No prose.
Read the file {item.file} and give a one-sentence summary of what it does.

Combine these per-file summaries into a short markdown overview of the directory:

{steps.summarize.output}
